TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ma’olaway, title = Ma’olaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ma’olaway} }

S.FORM: alang Ma'olaway ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 135 buwan, 319 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 100 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 219 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 27%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ma'olaway hya' ga Kalifangar. tay 'llaw na Ma'olaway hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ma'olaway ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ma'olaway ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Ma'olaway ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 135 buwan, 319 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 100 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 219 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 27%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ma'olaway hya' ga Kalifangar. tay 'llaw na Ma'olaway hya' ga Fafokod. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ma'olaway ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Ma'olaway ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maʔolawaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na maʔolawaj ħjaʔ ɣa kali*aŋar. taj ʔllaw na maʔolawaj ħjaʔ ɣa *a*oko*. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ maʔolawaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ maʔolawaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
